$_help: Copy this to scripts/bulk-config.json (drop the .example), edit prices + provenance + publish flags, then: node scripts/bulk-publish.mjs. Keys starting with $ are metadata (not SKUs). Every SKU's 'folder' must match a real folder inside ./Products/. To skip a SKU entirely, remove it from this file or set publish:false + folder:null.
$_reminder: Prices left null — you set them. Never copy from a competitor. Provenance below is applied to every SKU that doesn't set its own.
$default_provenance: Photos taken by Nishana Airguns of physical inventory held by the business, 2026-07-20. Original ownership of all uploaded images. Trademarked product names used nominatively; Nishana Airguns is an independent retailer and not an authorised dealer of Beretta, KWC, ASG, Aerosoft, H&N or their affiliates.

beretta-84fs.folder: BERETTA MOD. 84 FS CAL. 4.5 MM BB CO2 Air Pistol
beretta-84fs.name: Umarex Beretta 84 FS CO₂ Air Pistol (4.5 mm BB)
beretta-84fs.short_desc: Umarex-manufactured Beretta 84 FS licensed replica. 4.5 mm steel BB, 12 g CO₂ in grip, 19-round BB stick magazine, semi-automatic. Approximately 2.5 J muzzle energy — licence-exempt configuration under Arms Rules 2016. Model designations reference the licensed manufacturer's product name; Nishana Airguns is an independent retailer, not an authorised Beretta dealer.
beretta-84fs.legal_notes: Verify velocity + weight against physical product manual before publishing. Umarex product pages 404'd on 2026-07-20 research.

beretta-m92-a1.folder: BERETTA M92 A1 CAL. 4.5 MM .177 BB CO2 Air Pistol India
beretta-m92-a1.name: Umarex Beretta M92 A1 Full-Auto CO₂ Air Pistol (4.5 mm BB)
beretta-m92-a1.short_desc: Umarex-manufactured full-metal Beretta 92 A1 replica with realistic blowback and select-fire (semi + full-auto). 4.5 mm steel BB, 12 g CO₂ in grip, 18-round drop-out magazine. Approximately 2.0 J muzzle energy — licence-exempt configuration under Arms Rules 2016. Model designations reference the licensed manufacturer's product name; Nishana Airguns is an independent retailer, not an authorised Beretta dealer.
beretta-m92-a1.legal_notes: Full-auto capability — energy well under 20 J threshold. Enquire-only recommended until Arms Act clearance route is documented per SKU.

asg-x9-classic.folder: ASG X9 Classic Beretta CO2 Air Pistol – Full Metal Blowback  4.5mm (.177) Steel BB  Realistic Airgun by Airpistolindia
asg-x9-classic.name: ASG X9 Classic 4.5 mm CO₂ Blowback Pistol (Beretta 92-style)
asg-x9-classic.short_desc: ASG Denmark full-metal blowback CO₂ pistol in the Beretta 92 pattern. 4.5 mm steel BB, 17-round magazine, semi-automatic with realistic slide action. Approximately 2.5 J muzzle energy — licence-exempt configuration under Arms Rules 2016. Model designations reference the licensed manufacturer's product name; Nishana Airguns is an independent retailer, not an authorised Beretta dealer.
asg-x9-classic.legal_notes: Verify velocity against physical product manual. ASG official product page 404'd on 2026-07-20.

aerosoft-x1.folder: Aerosoft X1 CO₂ Air Pistol (Beretta 84FS) by Airpistolindia
aerosoft-x1.name: Aerosoft X1 CO₂ Air Pistol (4.5 mm BB, Beretta 84 FS-style)
aerosoft-x1.short_desc: 4.5 mm CO₂ BB pistol in the Beretta 84 FS pattern. 12 g CO₂ in grip, semi-automatic. Verify muzzle energy and manufacturer specifications from the physical product manual before publishing.
aerosoft-x1.legal_notes: Aerosoft OEM parentage unclear — likely Chinese/Taiwanese rebrand. Verify manufacturer + energy from physical product before publishing.

kwc-k18.folder: KWC K18 Full Automatic 4.5MM BB CO2 Pistol
kwc-k18.name: KWC K18 Full-Auto CO₂ Pistol (4.5 mm BB, Glock 18-style)
kwc-k18.short_desc: KWC Taiwan full-metal, select-fire CO₂ pistol in the Glock 18 pattern. 4.5 mm steel BB, 17-round magazine, blowback, semi and full-auto. Cyclic rate ~1200 RPM. Approximately 2.7 J muzzle energy — licence-exempt configuration under Arms Rules 2016.
kwc-k18.legal_notes: Full-auto BB — energy under 20 J threshold. Recommend enquiry-only + WhatsApp ID capture per order until Arms Act clearance route documented.

kwc-m92.folder: KWC M92 Full Automatic 4.5MM BB CO2 Pistol
kwc-m92.name: KWC M92 Full-Auto CO₂ Pistol (4.5 mm BB, Beretta 92-style)
kwc-m92.short_desc: KWC Taiwan full-auto CO₂ pistol in the Beretta 92 pattern. 4.5 mm steel BB, 17-round drop-out magazine, blowback, select-fire semi + full-auto. Approximately 2.5 J muzzle energy — licence-exempt configuration under Arms Rules 2016. Model designations reference the manufacturer's product name; Nishana Airguns is an independent retailer, not an authorised Beretta dealer.
kwc-m92.legal_notes: Same full-auto framing note as KWC K18.

hn-hornet-pellets.folder: H&N Hornet Pellets, .177 Cal, 9.57 Grains, Pointed, 225ct
hn-hornet-pellets.name: H&N Hornet .177 Pointed Pellets — 225 count
hn-hornet-pellets.short_desc: Pointed .177-calibre lead pellets from H&N Sport (Germany, established 1949). 9.57 grains / 0.620 g, head diameter 4.51 mm. 225 pellets per tin. Suited to the Star RX Gen 3 or any other 4.5 mm airgun that accepts diabolo pellets.
hn-hornet-pellets.legal_notes: Ammunition accessory, not an airgun. Confirm inventory before publishing — earlier attestation noted no physical stock confirmed for this SKU.
